nasb.text: The wicked is thrust down by his wrongdoing, But the righteous has a refuge when he dies.

esv.text: The wicked is overthrown through his evildoing, but the righteous finds refuge in his death.

cnv.text: 惡人必因自己所行的惡事被推倒， 義人死的時候仍有所倚靠。

ccb.text: 恶人因恶行而灭亡， 义人到死仍有倚靠。

csbs.text: 恶人因自己的恶行被推倒， 义人在临死时有投靠。
